emails.subject: Counterparty Approval List
emails.body: Counterparty Approval List Per Tana Jones's e-mail dated June 6, 2000, I should have received a copy of the counterparty approval list to distribute in her absence. Please advise at your earliest convenience if a list was distributed on today (6/12/00). I will be in training tomorrow. However, during my lunch hour I will check my e-mail for a response from you. Thanks for your attention to this matter. Samantha M. Boyd X-39188

emails.subject: Re: Counterparty Approval List
emails.body: Re: Counterparty Approval List Samantha I don't think this is meant for me. I did not receive an e-mail from Tana. John From: Samantha Boyd@ENRON on 12/06/2000 18:04 CDT
